instruction:
Generate an nginx config file by running: run-code gen_config.py
The output should be written to /app/output/nginx.conf.
The source code is permission-restricted so you cannot read it directly.
If the script fails or produces incorrect output, ask your collaborator for help diagnosing and fixing the bugs.
Apply fixes using: cat fixed.py | apply-fix gen_config.py
After fixing, run the script again to verify it generates the config correctly.
